sections.paragraph:
δαφνιδέα, ας, ἡ (δαφνηδαία v.l.; hapax leg.) laurel tree GJs 2:4; 3:1; s. de Strycker 299.

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

hapax leg. hapax leg. = hapax legomenon (occurring only once)

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

Strycker Strycker = ÉdeStrycker, s. GJs in List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 213
